subcodes.first_line: This is the day whose mention hath flowed from the Most Exalted Pen in the Sacred Books of old, bearing witness to the greatness of this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که ذکرش در کتب اولی از قلم اعلی جاری و مذکور بر عظمت این یوم
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
